title: The Adventures Of Captain Underpants
author: Dav Pilkey
desc: George & Harold hypnotize Principal Krupp into Captain Underpants!

q.en: Who are the two best friends at the center of the story?
q.zh: 故事里的两个好朋友是谁？

options.zh: 内裤队长和尿布博士（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: Mr. Krupp and the gym teacher
options.zh: 克拉普校长和体育老师
乔治·比尔德和哈罗德·哈钦斯

explain.en: George Beard (the kid with the tie and flat-top) and Harold Hutchins (the one with the T-shirt and bad haircut) are next-door neighbors and fourth-grade best friends.
explain.zh: 乔治·比尔德（打着领带、留平头的男孩）和哈罗德·哈钦斯（穿T恤、发型糟糕的男孩）是邻居，也是四年级的好朋友。

q.en: What did George and Harold do inside their backyard tree house?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德在后院的树屋里做什么？

options.en: Write and draw their own comic books
options.zh: 编写并绘制他们自己的漫画书
躲开他们的父母（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Inside 'Tree House Comix, Inc.' Harold loved to draw and George loved to make up stories, so together they spent hours writing and drawing their own comic books, including Captain Underpants.
explain.zh: 在“树屋漫画公司”里，哈罗德爱画画，乔治爱编故事，两人一起花好几个小时编写绘制自己的漫画，其中就有《内裤队长》。

q.en: How did George come up with the idea for Captain Underpants?
q.zh: 乔治是怎么想出“内裤队长”这个主意的？

options.en: He saw a superhero on TV
options.zh: 他在电视上看到一个超级英雄

options.en: He noticed most superheroes look like they fly around in their underwear, so this one actually does
options.zh: 他觉得大多数超级英雄都像穿着内裤在飞，所以这个干脆就真的穿着内裤飞

options.en: He read it in a newspaper
His teacher gave him the idea
options.zh: 是他的老师给了他灵感（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）（你能在书里找到关于这个的线索。）

explain.en: George said, 'Most superheroes look like they're flying around in their underwear. Well, this guy actually IS flying around in his underwear!'
explain.zh: 乔治说：“大多数超级英雄看起来都像穿着内裤在飞。那这个家伙干脆就真的穿着内裤在飞！”

q.en: How much did George and Harold sell each homemade comic for on the playground?
q.zh: 乔治和哈罗德在操场上每本自制漫画卖多少钱？

explain.en: After sneaking copies on the school copy machine, they sold their homemade comics on the playground for 50¢ each.
explain.zh: 他们偷偷用学校的复印机印了好多本，然后在操场上以每本50美分（50¢）出售。

options.zh: 学校食堂的厨师（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

options.en: The mean principal of Jerome Horwitz Elementary School
options.zh: 杰罗姆·霍维茨小学严厉的校长

explain.en: Mr. Krupp is the principal — described as the meanest, sourest principal in the school's history, who hates laughter, singing, children, and especially George and Harold.
explain.zh: 克拉普先生是校长——被描述为全校历史上最刻薄、最暴躁的校长，他讨厌笑声、唱歌、孩子，尤其讨厌乔治和哈罗德。

q.en: At the big football game, what did the boys sprinkle into the cheerleaders' pom-poms?
q.zh: 在那场大型橄榄球赛上，男孩们在啦啦队员的绒球里撒了什么？

options.zh: 沐浴泡泡液（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: A fan noticed: 'Somebody sprinkled black pepper into the cheerleaders' pom-poms!' causing them to sneeze nonstop.
explain.zh: 有观众发现：“有人在啦啦队员的绒球里撒了黑胡椒粉！”害得她们一直打喷嚏。

q.en: How did Mr. Krupp finally catch George and Harold in the act?
q.zh: 克拉普先生最终是怎么当场抓到乔治和哈罗德的？

options.en: With tiny hidden video surveillance cameras
options.zh: 用隐藏的微型监控摄像头
有同学告发了他们（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Mr. Krupp said he 'installed tiny video surveillance cameras all around the school' and had a videotape of the boys pulling the pranks.
explain.zh: 克拉普先生说他“在全校安装了微型监控摄像头”，并录下了男孩们捣乱的录像带。

q.en: To fix their problem, what did George order from a magazine ad?
q.zh: 为了摆脱困境，乔治从杂志广告里订购了什么？

options.zh: 一只宠物金鱼（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: George found an ad for the 3-D Hypno-Ring from the Li'l Wiseguy Novelty Co. ($2.99 plus $1.01 shipping) and planned to hypnotize Mr. Krupp.
explain.zh: 乔治找到一则“小机灵 novelty 公司”的3D催眠戒指广告（2.99美元加1.01美元运费），打算用它来催眠克拉普先生。

q.en: What special power does Captain Underpants use to fight bad guys?
q.zh: 内裤队长用什么特殊力量对付坏人？

options.zh: 超级速度（这个系列的一些小粉丝可能会选这个。）

explain.en: Harold joked the hero 'could fight with Wedgie Power!' and Captain Underpants later threatens villains with 'Wedgie Power.'
explain.zh: 哈罗德开玩笑说这个英雄“可以用 wedgie 力量战斗！”，后来内裤队长也用“wedgie 力量”对付坏蛋。

q.en: Who is the evil villain that wants to blow up the moon with the Laser-Matic 2000?
q.zh: 想用“激光机2000”炸掉月亮的邪恶反派是谁？

explain.en: The strange little man wearing a diaper is 'the evil Dr. Diaper,' who plans to blow up the moon and take over the world with his Laser-Matic 2000.
explain.zh: 那个穿着尿布的小个子男人就是“邪恶的尿布博士”，他计划用“激光机2000”炸掉月亮并统治世界。
